oslo-sofa.name: Oslo 3-Seater Sofa
oslo-sofa.price_note: Price varies by fabric & size. Final quote after selection.
oslo-sofa.description: The Oslo Sofa is a masterclass in modern minimalism. Clean straight lines paired with deep plush cushions create a piece that is as comfortable as it is beautiful. Handcrafted in our Karachi workshop using sustainably sourced hardwood frames and premium upholstery fabrics.

cove-sectional.name: Cove L-Shape Sectional
cove-sectional.price_note: Price varies by configuration and fabric.
cove-sectional.description: The Cove L-Shape Sectional is a generous, modular sofa designed for large living rooms. Its deep seating and chaise extension make it the perfect centrepiece for family spaces or executive lounges.

arc-lounge-chair.name: Arc Lounge Chair
arc-lounge-chair.description: The Arc Lounge Chair is a sculptural accent piece with a solid ash wood base and a generously cushioned seat. Perfect for reading corners, hotel lobbies, or as a statement piece in any room.

haven-king-bed.name: Haven King Bed
haven-king-bed.price_note: Price varies by fabric and size. Queen size available.
haven-king-bed.description: The Haven King Bed features a softly upholstered headboard and a solid walnut frame. A statement piece for the master bedroom — refined, comfortable, and built to last a generation.

forma-wardrobe.name: Forma Sliding Wardrobe
forma-wardrobe.price_note: Price based on linear metre. Custom sizes available.
forma-wardrobe.description: The Forma Sliding Wardrobe is a floor-to-ceiling built-in solution with smooth sliding doors and a fully customizable interior. Available in matte, gloss, and wood finishes to match any bedroom style.

mesa-dining-table.name: Mesa Dining Table
mesa-dining-table.price_note: Price varies by size. Custom lengths available.
mesa-dining-table.description: The Mesa Dining Table is a solid oak top paired with brushed steel legs — a perfect balance of warmth and industrial edge. Seats 6-8 comfortably and is available in custom sizes for larger spaces.

alto-bar-stool.name: Alto Bar Stool
alto-bar-stool.price_note: Price per pair. Single units available.
alto-bar-stool.description: The Alto Bar Stool combines an upholstered seat with a powder-coated steel frame for a sleek, durable finish. Ideal for kitchen islands, bar counters, and commercial hospitality settings.

focus-executive-desk.name: Focus Executive Desk
focus-executive-desk.price_note: Price varies by size and cable management options.
focus-executive-desk.description: The Focus Executive Desk brings refined minimalism to the workplace. A walnut veneer top with integrated cable management and clean geometric lines — built for the modern executive who values both aesthetics and function.

grid-bookshelf.name: Grid Bookshelf
grid-bookshelf.price_note: Price per unit. Modular — can be combined.
grid-bookshelf.description: The Grid Bookshelf is a modular open shelving system in solid oak. It can be wall-mounted or free-standing, and multiple units can be combined to create a full wall of storage. Timeless design, maximum flexibility.

float-tv-console.name: Float TV Console
float-tv-console.price_note: Price varies by width. Up to 75 inch TV compatible.
float-tv-console.description: The Float TV Console is a wall-mounted media unit with a clean, floating aesthetic. Soft-close drawers, hidden cable management, and a matte lacquer finish make it as functional as it is beautiful.

terrace-lounge-set.name: Terrace Lounge Set
terrace-lounge-set.price_note: Price for full set — sofa, 2 chairs, coffee table.
terrace-lounge-set.description: The Terrace Lounge Set is crafted from premium teak with weatherproof cushions for year-round outdoor use. Designed for rooftops, terraces, and garden spaces — built to withstand the elements while looking stunning.
